title: This Theory Explains the Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: A podcast episode featuring David Reich discussing a theory that explains patterns in Neanderthal DNA and human ancestry. The conversation addresses mysteries in ancient DNA research and evolutionary genetics.
